visual_intent: believable wellness context rather than staged luxury
brand_guardrails: keep it realistic, quiet, and premium
avoid influencer-style posing or cluttered environments
preserve the Steel Light palette and restraint
match mood, palette, light quality, whitespace, and restraint from the selected references without duplicating exact crop, pose, object placement, or gradient pattern
composition: natural daylight or diffused studio daylight
one believable ritual moment such as a desk reset, reading pause, or calm morning setup
clean negative space for one short Japanese headline
product may appear naturally but does not need to dominate
reference_strategy: Use editorial-whitespace for air and composition, cool-palette for tonality, and bottle-with-tablets only if the product appears as a secondary natural object in the scene.
variation_guardrails: do not create a staged influencer or luxury-hotel scene
keep the environment minimal and lived-in
allow realism to lead more than graphics
maintain text-safe space without making the scene empty

slides_ja: サブラインのプレースホルダー

notes: Template Set 4 reference asset. Build a premium realistic lifestyle scene that can support carousels, reels, and bridge posts without breaking the Mitozz visual system.
